declared_scope: Canonical parent baseline as of 2026-06-26: the accepted v0.11-zram-swappiness stack (v0.9 + zram + swappiness=60). Future candidates screen against this.
promotion_basis: Accepted promotion of candidate v0.11-zram-swappiness (cycle 3). Three confirming screens: Stardust normal fitness +0.0954, laptop cross-machine +0.1004, Stardust reversed +0.0947 -> confidence 0.875, decision accepted, fitness +0.1004. Memory channel +75.4% with no inference regression (cold-start -0.5%, sustained 0.0%). First variant selected by the memory-pressure channel. See CursiveOS/HANDOVER.md and CursiveResearch VALIDATION.md.
rollback_method: Delegates to v0.11 preset undo (zram removal + v0.9 stack restore); harness reverts at run end.
